history.content:
<thought>
I am currently at row 02, column B, facing right ('>'). The goal is at row 08, column H. Moving forward to row 02, column C is dangerous since it contains lava ('L'). I should turn to find a safe path. Turning down ('v') by turning right from '>' will let me move downward where there are safe floor cells.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down ('v') at row 02, column B. The next cell below at row 03, column B is floor ('.'), so it is safe to move forward. This will move me closer to the goal at row 08, column H while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

</thought>
<action>
